description: Simulates pressing or holding onto the shift key on a normal physical keyboard.

fields.Keyboard: The keyboard which the keys should be set or unset from the holding shift state.
fields.HoldPressInterval: what value ``_lastPress`` has to be below when the button is pressed again to enable ``AlwaysHold`` field.
fields.AlwaysHold: Whether the user has double clicked shift and enabled a constant hold shift state.
fields._lastPress: Internal, how many seconds has passed since this button was last pressed. is used to handle enabling/disabling ``AlwaysHold`` field.
